candidate.rationale: Known-person recall is 0.7777777777777778. Several missed identities have usable voice evidence but no reliable face signal.
candidate.required_change: Add a conservative voice-only assignment path for known speakers when voice confidence, duration, and candidate margin are all strong.
risk_notes: Could falsely assign unknown speakers with similar voices.
Must keep short utterances blocked from auto-assignment.

config.description: Allow high-margin long voice evidence for known speakers

candidate.rationale: Similar-voice and overlap cases are both becoming unknown, but they represent different failures. The harness needs clearer verification outcomes.
candidate.required_change: Classify close top-candidate margins as needs_review with conflict provenance instead of dropping them into generic unknown.
risk_notes: Review rate can rise if too many ambiguous spans are escalated.

config.description: Separate ambiguous voice evidence from weak evidence

candidate.rationale: The conservative strategy leaves known speakers unresolved even when evidence is strong enough to evaluate threshold tradeoffs.
candidate.required_change: Move resolver thresholds into a config object and test a tighter policy for voice duration, confidence, and margin.
risk_notes: Threshold tuning can overfit synthetic fixtures.
Thresholds must stay documented and configurable.

config.description: Tune assignment and review thresholds for fixture loop
